Funnel #2: The Audit Funnel
About this funnel...
Ideal for experienced Facebook marketers that are comfortable running audits on client accounts LIVE but that don't necessarily have case studies or testimonials.
All three variations work unniched and niched.
Overview: First Step
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

STEP #1: Click the button below to download the full funnel to your own Click Funnel account
STEP #2: Set the wheels in motion for your own live audit recording by posting the following in a business/start-up/entrepreneur (or niche of your specialty) group (please be sure to read
the terms of the group you are posting in)....
"Would anyone be interested in a free (no-pitch) Facebook ad campaign audit to assess why your ads weren't/aren't getting the results you're after or how to improve them?"

Variation #1: Landing Page

-- 2 of 4 --

Zapier
Click Funnels
Ad Account
Schedule Once
Wufoo
Email CRM
NOTE: This training uses a simple email platform - certain CRMs (such as Active Campaign) won't require two lists, instead you can add tags
Key Landing Page Links (view live URLs)
Opt-in Page (Page A): 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/replay13054160
Opt-In Replay Page (Page B): 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/replay13054161
Wufoo Page (Page C): 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/wuffoo13054162
Schedule Once (Page D): 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/thank-you13054163
Confirmed (Page E): 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/confirmed13054164
"Dud" (Page F): 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/healthcheck130541
PRINTABLE INSTRUCTIONS
Step #1: Download funnel to Click Funnels (or set up your own)
Set up custom domains (optional)
Step #2: Set up your wufoo form:
Create conditional logic (redirect to Page: F)
Make redirect to Schedule Once landing page [Page: D]
Embed on landing page
Step #3: Set up Schedule Once Form
Make sure time slots correct (allow bookings no more than 4 days out)
Make sure SMS notification turned on 1hr before call
Redirect to Confirmation page from funnel [Page: E]
Add zoom link or appear.in link to your invitation
Step #4: Set up pixel & tracking
Add base pixel to each page of your funnel
Add ‘AUDITOPTIN’ to Page B
Add ‘AUDITBOOKEDCALL’ custom event to Confirmation page [Page: E]
Add ‘NOGO’ custom event to Page F
Open up both Page E and Page C in a new tab to check events and trigger the events
Under the Customer Conversion tab – create customer conversions for both ‘NOGO’ and ‘AUDITBOOKEDCALL’
Step #5: Create email list
Create two lists: One for opt-ins and one for booked calls
Create automated messages for Opt-In list
Create email automation (when someone is subscribed to the Booked Call list they are unsubscribed to the Audit Opt-In list)
Step #6: Integrate your funnel with your email list
Integrate Page A pop-up with Opt-In email list
Create Zapier Zap between Wufoo and Booked Call List
Step #7: Create Your Custom Audiences
CA #1: Visited Page A last 180 Days
CA #2: Opted In – last 180 Days
CA #3: Booked Call – last 180 Days
Step #8: Create Facebook Ad
Conversion objective campaign – exclude CA #1, CA #2, CA #3
Replicate ad copy/creative
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

IDEAS FOR UN-NICHED FUNNEL TARGETING
Run a lookalike from your leads or those that clicked	1.
Use the FB Page hack (see Targeting training) (ex: go to a business conference FB Page, try and find similar pages).	2.
Export contact list from LinkedIn of founders and business owners - create a lookalike from this	3.
Step #9: Go Live!!!!
Variation #2: Lead Ad
What You'll Need
Zapier
Click Funnels (Pages C, D, E, F)
Ad Account
Schedule Once
Wufoo
Email CRM
NOTE: If you are using Active Campaign - you don't need Twilio for SMS
PRINTABLE INSTRUCTIONS
Step #1: Make sure you have landing pages C,D,E & F (with pixels and tracking – see instructions under Variation A for this)
Step #2: Create Lead Ad campaign and lead form
Collect Name, Email & Phone Number
Replicate copy Cat provides
Please note – average cost per lead form completed will be around $9-$15
Step #3: Set up Custom Audiences
CA #1: Opted in Lead Form – 180 Days
CA #2: Opted In – last 180 Days
CA #3: Booked Call – last 180 Days
Step #4: Set up Twilio Account
Will need “Upgrade’ version so that you can send SMS
Generate your number
Step #5: Create email list
See instructions under Variation A for this (you will need two lists)
Step #6: Integrate using Zapier
Integrate Lead Ad with Twilio (SMS) and create SMS message (copy the one provided by Cat)
Integrate Wufoo with Email List (Opted In)
Step #7: GO LIVE!
support@cathowell.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
